items.claim: Sam Patterson has a five-inch reach advantage over Santiago Ponzinibbio.
Sam Patterson has a three-inch height advantage over Santiago Ponzinibbio.
Sam Patterson is nine years younger than Santiago Ponzinibbio.
Santiago Ponzinibbio throws wide shots, which will allow Patterson to connect with straight punches.
items.quote: the way Ponzi fights and he throws those wide shots, Patterson's going to connect with straits.
